task_completion.description: Create a new tiddler titled 'Project Dashboard'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler being edited or viewed with the exact title 'Project Dashboard' in the title field.
Look for the tag pill 'Dashboard' applied to the 'Project Dashboard' tiddler.

task_completion.description: Create three sections with headings for 'Todo', 'InProgress', and 'Done'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for wikitext headings (e.g., '! Todo', '! InProgress', '! Done') in the editor, or rendered bold/large heading text for these three exact statuses in the view mode.

task_completion.description: Use the <$count> widget to show the total number of items in each category
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the '<$count filter=...>' wikitext in the tiddler editor. If only the rendered view is visible, look for numbers representing the count of tasks displayed next to or under each of the three headings.

task_completion.description: Use the <$list> widget to dynamically display tiddlers with the corresponding status
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the '<$list filter=...>' wikitext in the tiddler editor. The filter should dynamically match the status tags (e.g., '[tag[Todo]]'). If only the rendered view is visible, look for a populated list of task items under each heading.

task_completion.description: Ensure the dynamically displayed tiddlers are clickable links
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rendered view, the listed task items should appear as clickable hyperlinks (typically blue text). In the editor, this is the default behavior of the <$list> widget unless explicitly overridden.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki interface via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser displaying the TiddlyWiki interface, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used dynamic filters rather than hardcoding the 15 task titles.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tiddler editor should show filter expressions (like '[tag[Todo]]') rather than a manually typed list of specific task names.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'echo' or 'cat' being used to directly write the tiddler file to the filesystem.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target dashboard tiddler must be titled exactly 'Project Dashboard' and include the tag 'Dashboard'.
